<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.put(packet_id);
        stream.write_ prefixed(username);
        stream.write_ prefixed(scores);
        stream.put(hexi::null_terminated(metadata));
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::exception_tag allow_throw {};
    hexi::allocators/block_allocator<>::init();
    buffer.set_error_tag(&allow_throw);
    hexi::stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    const auto data = buffer.read_data();
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(data, data + buffer.size());
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::exception_tag except_tag;
    hexi::stream_read stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    NetworkPacket packet;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    stream.get(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    {
        hexi::prefixed<4> username_adaptor(except_tag);
        std::string username;
        username_adaptor->read(stream, &username, hexi::allocators::default_allocator<std::string>());
        packet.username = std::move(username);
    }

    // Read score count and scores
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    stream.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    score_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(score_count);
    if (score_count > 0) {
        packet.scores.resize(score_count);
        hexi::allocators::default_allocator<uint32_t> allocator;
        stream.read_container(packet.scores.data(), score_count, sizeof(uint32_t), &allocator);
        for (auto& score : packet.scores) {
            score = hexi::endian::le_to_native(score);
        }
    }

    // Read metadata as null-terminated string
    {
        hexi::null_terminated<std::string> metadata_adaptor(except_tag);
        std::string metadata;
        metadata_adaptor->read(stream, &metadata, hexi::allocators::default_allocator<std::string>());
        packet.metadata = std::move(metadata);
    }

    // Skip remaining padding
    const auto total_read = stream.total_read();
    if (total_read < buffer.size()) {
        stream.skip(buffer.size() - total_read);
    }

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::exception_tag except_tag;
    hexi::stream_read stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    PacketInfo info;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    stream.get(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    info.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(packet_id);

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix into string_view
    {
        hexi::prefixed<4> username_adaptor(except_tag);
        std::string username;
        username_adaptor->read(stream, &username, hexi::allocators::default_allocator<std::string>());
        info.username = username_view;
    }

    // Read score count and skip scores data
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    stream.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    score_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(score_count);
    const auto bytes_to_skip = score_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    stream.skip(bytes_to_skip + sizeof(score_count));

    // Skip metadata (null-terminated)
    auto pos = stream.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    if (pos != stream.npos) {
        stream.skip(pos + 1); // include null terminator
    }

    // Skip remaining padding
    const auto total_read = stream.total_read();
    if (total_read < buffer.size()) {
        stream.skip(buffer.size() - total_read);
    }

    return info;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data() + buffer.size();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.readable_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - info.readable_size;
    return info;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    const auto required = 4 + 4 + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    if(required > (buffer.capacity() - buffer.size())) {
        return false;
    }

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);

    stream.put(hexi::endian::native_to_little(header));
    stream.write_container(items);

    return true;
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    const auto required_size = sizeof(PacketHeader);
    if(buffer.size() < required_size) {
        // Assuming buffer is valid as per problem statement; handle error if needed.
        return {}; // Return default-constructed header if buffer is too small.

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<read> buffer_read(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_read);
    PacketHeader header;
    stream >> header;
    return header;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstring>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(const std::span<const char> buffer) {
    assert(buffer.size() >= 4);
    const auto min_req_size = 4 + 1; // header + null terminator
    
    if(buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small for header and null terminator"));
    }
    
    hexi::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    uint32_t header = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le(header);
    
    // Find null terminator
    const auto pos = buffer.find_first_of('\0');
    
    if(pos == buffer.npos) {
        return { header, std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + 4), buffer.size() - 4) };
    }
    
    return { header, std::string_view(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(buffer.data() + 4), pos - 4) };
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    uint32_t swapped_header = __builtin_bswap_32(header);
    buffer.write(&swapped_header, sizeof(swapped_header));
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

template<size_t block_size>
BufferData<block_size> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<block_size> result;
    uint32_t swapped_header = 0;
    buffer.read(&swapped_header, sizeof(swapped_header));
    result.header = __builtin_bswap_32(swapped_header);
    result.data.resize(data_length);
    buffer.read(result.data.data(), data_length);
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/tls_block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <type_traits>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size, typename ref_count_policy = hexi::no_ref_counting,
	byte_type storage_value_type = std::byte>
concept writeable =
	std::is_same_v<storage_value_type, std::byte> || std::is_same_v<storage_value_type, std::char> || std::is_same_v<storage_value_type, std::wchar_t> || std::is_same_v<storage_value_type, std::char16_t> || std::is_same_v<storage_value_type, std::char32_t>;

template<typename buffer_type>
concept arithmetic = std::integral<buffer_type> || std::floating_point<buffer_type>;

template<decltype(auto) size>
concept gt_zero = size > 0;

template<typename T, typename U>
concept sizeof_gte = sizeof(T) >= sizeof(U);

/* Returns true if there's any overlap between source and destination ranges */
[[maybe_unused]]
static inline bool region_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len,
                                  const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
	const auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
	const auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
	const auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
	const auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
	return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

namespace hexi {

using namespace detail;

template<typename buffer_type, typename count_type = std::size_t>
constexpr auto generate_filled(const count_type count, std::byte value) {
	assert(!gt_zero<0>(count));
	using cvalue_type = typename buffer_type::value_type;
	const auto bytes = count * sizeof(cvalue_type);
	auto target = new cvalue_type[bytes];
	for(count_type i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
		target[i] = value;
	}
	return target;
}

template<typename buffer_type, typename count_type = std::size_t>
constexpr auto generate_sequence(const count_type count) {
	assert(gt_zero<0>(count));
	using cvalue_type = typename buffer_type::value_type;
	const auto bytes = count * sizeof(cvalue_type);
	auto target = new cvalue_type[bytes];
	for(count_type i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
		target[i] = static_cast<cvalue_type>(i);
	}
	return target;
}

template<decltype(auto) size>
constexpr auto generate_filled(const size count, std::byte value) {
	return generate_filled<default_buffer<size>>(count, value);
}

template<decltype(auto) size>
constexpr auto generate_sequence(const size count) {
	return generate_sequence<default_buffer<size>>(count);
}

template<typename buffer_type, typename count_type = std::size_t>
constexpr auto generate_fibonacci(const count_type count) {
	assert(gt_zero<0>(count));
	using cvalue_type = typename buffer_type::value_type;
	const auto bytes = count * sizeof(cvalue_type);
	auto target = new cvalue_type[bytes];
	target[0] = 0;
	target[1] = 1;
	for(count_type i = 2; i < count; ++i) {
		target[i] = target[i-1] + target[i-2];
	}
	return target;
}

template<decltype(auto) size>
constexpr auto generate_fibonacci(const size count) {
	return generate_fibonacci<default_buffer<size>>(count);
}

template<typename buffer_type, typename count_type = std::size_t>
constexpr auto generate_prime(const count_type count) {
	assert(gt_zero<0>(count));
	using cvalue_type = typename buffer_type::value_type;
	const auto bytes = count * sizeof(cvalue_type);
	auto target = new cvalue_type[bytes];
	target[0] = 2;
	count_type primes = 1;
	for(cvalue_type i = 3; primes < count; i += 2) {
		bool is_prime = true;
		for(count_type j = 0; j < primes && target[j] * target[j] <= i; ++j) {
			if(i % target[j] == 0) {
				is_prime = false;
				break;
			}
		}
		if(is_prime) {
			target[primes++] = i;
		}
	}
	return target;
}

template<decltype(auto) size>
constexpr auto generate_prime(const size count) {
	return generate_prime<default_buffer<size>>(count);
}

} // hexi</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <iostream>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    hexi::block_allocator<int, element_count> allocator;
    std::vector<int*> allocated;
    
    // Allocate elements to fill the initial block
    for (size_t i = 0; i < element_count; ++i) {
        allocated.push_back(allocator.allocate());
    }

    // Deallocate elements in reverse order to build the free list
    for (size_t i = 0; i < element_count; ++i) {
        allocator.deallocate(allocated[element_count - 1 - i]);
    }

    // Reallocate and check if addresses are reused in reverse order
    std::vector<int*> reallocated;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < element_count; ++i) {
        reallocated.push_back(allocator.allocate());
    }

    bool success = true;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < element_count; ++i) {
        if (reallocated[i] != allocated[element_count - 1 - i]) {
            success = false;
            break;
        }
    }

    std::cout << (success 
        ? "Free list management demonstrated successfully."
        : "Free list management demonstration failed.") << std::endl;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<typename T>
T convert_to_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_to_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_little(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::little_to_native(value);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <bit>

template<std::endian from, std::endian to, typename T>
T convert_endianness(T value) {
    if constexpr (from == to) {
        return value;
    }
    if constexpr (from == std::endian::little && to == std::endian::big) {
        return hexi::endian::le_to_be(value);
    } else if constexpr (from == std::endian::big && to == std::endian::little) {
        return hexi::endian::be_to_le(value);
    } else if constexpr (from == std::endian::native && to == std::endian::little) {
        return hexi::endian::native_to_le(value);
    } else if constexpr (from == std::endian::native && to == std::endian::big) {
        return hexi::endian::native_to_be(value);
    } else if constexpr (from == std::endian::little && to == std::endian::native) {
        return hexi::endian::le_to_native(value);
    } else if constexpr (from == std::endian::big && to == std::endian::native) {
        return hexi::endian::be_to_native(value);
    } else {
        return value;
    }
}

template<typename T>
T convert_endianness_runtime(T value, std::endian from, std::endian to) {
    if (from == to) {
        return value;
    }
    if (from == std::endian::little && to == std::endian::big) {
        return hexi::endian::le_to_be(value);
    } else if (from == std::endian::big && to == std::endian::little) {
        return hexi::endian::be_to_le(value);
    } else if (from == std::endian::native && to == std::endian::little) {
        return hexi::endian::native_to_le(value);
    } else if (from == std::endian::native && to == std::endian::big) {
        return hexi::endian::native_to_be(value);
    } else if (from == std::endian::little && to == std::endian::native) {
        return hexi::endian::le_to_native(value);
    } else if (from == std::endian::big && to == std::endian::native) {
        return hexi::endian::be_to_native(value);
    } else {
        return value;
    }
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<hexi::endian::conversion conv, typename T>
constexpr T convert_with_enum(T value) {
    switch(conv) {
        case hexi::endian::big_to_native:
            return hexi::endian::from_big(value);
        case hexi::endian::native_to_big:
            return hexi::endian::to_big(value);
        case hexi::endian::little_to_native:
            return hexi::endian::from_little(value);
        case hexi::endian::native_to_little:
            return hexi::endian::to_little(value);
        default:
            std::unreachable();
    }
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    size_t read_size = storage.size();
    size_t actual_read = std::min(read_size, bytes_to_preview);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(actual_read);
    const char* read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    std::memcpy(destination.data(), read_ptr + storage.read_offset(), actual_read);
    return destination;
}

template<size_t block_size>
BufferStatus<block_size> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<block_size> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.size();
    status.free_space = storage.free();
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.reset();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(destination.data(), destination.size());
    return destination;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    buffer.copy(destination.data(), destination.size());
    return destination;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence());
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_sequence());
    return buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <filesystem>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <utility>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace detail;

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    using namespace hexi;

    file_buffer file;
    if (!file.open(file_path.string().c_str(), file_buffer::sk_absolute_seek)) {
        HEXI_THROW(exception("Failed to open file: " + file_path.string()));
    }

    char buffer[4];
    file.read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));

    uint32_t value = 0;
    std::memcpy(&value, buffer, sizeof(value));
    value = endian::le_to_native(value);

    file.close();
    return value;
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    using namespace hexi;

    file_buffer file;
    if (!file.open(file_path.string().c_str(), file_buffer::sk_write)) {
        HEXI_THROW(exception("Failed to open file: " + file_path.string()));
    }

    uint32_t swapped = endian::native_to_le(value);
    char buffer[4];
    std::memcpy(buffer, &swapped, sizeof(swapped));
    file.write(buffer, sizeof(buffer));

    file.close();
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <string>

void write_string_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::string& str) {
    const std::uint32_t size = hexi::endian::native_to_little(static_cast<std::uint32_t>(str.size()));
    writer.put(&size, sizeof(size));
    writer.put(str.data(), str.size());
}

std::string read_string_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    std::uint32_t size = 0;
    reader.get(&size, sizeof(size));
    size = hexi::endian::little_to_native(size);

    if (size > static_cast<std::uint32_t>(-1)) { // Check for overflow
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("String size exceeds maximum possible value"));
    }

    std::string str;
    str.resize_and_overwrite(size, [&](char* buffer, std::size_t len) {
        reader.get(buffer, len);
        return len;
    });

    return str;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read.h>

#include <cstdint>

std::size_t find_byte_in_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer[i] == value) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

std::size_t find_delimiter_position(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte delimiter) {
    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); ++i) {
        if (buffer[i] == delimiter) {
            return i;
        }
    }
    return hexi::pmc::buffer_read::npos;
}

bool check_buffer_contains(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::byte value) {
    for (const std::byte& byte : buffer) {
        if (byte == value) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

const void* get_read_pointer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

struct BufferState {
    std::size_t size;
    const void* read_ptr;
    bool is_empty;
};

BufferState get_buffer_state(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    BufferState state;
    state.size = buffer.size();
    state.read_ptr = buffer.read_ptr();
    state.is_empty = (state.size == 0);
    return state;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string_view sv;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(sv);
    return std::string(sv);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    const auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    const auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    const auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    const auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {
    std::array<std::uint8_t, Size> target{};
    for(std::size_t i = 0; i < Size; ++i) {
        target[i] = value;
    }
    return target;
}

bool verify_filled_array(const auto& arr, std::uint8_t expected_value) {
    for(const auto& elem : arr) {
        if(elem != expected_value) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.buff_size(),
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.read_limit(),
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    // Write packet ID as fixed 4-byte value
    adaptor.write(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));

    // Serialize tags with prefixed varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(adaptor, packet.tags.size());
    for (const auto& tag : packet.tags) {
        hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(adaptor, tag.size());
        adaptor.write(tag.data().c_str(), tag.size());
    }

    // Serialize data with prefixed varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint_encode(adaptor, packet.data.size());
    adaptor.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);

    // Read packet ID
    adaptor.get(&packet.packet_id, sizeof(packet.packet_id));

    // Deserialize tags
    const auto num_tags = hexi::prefixed_varint_decode<int>(adaptor);
    packet.tags.resize(num_tags);
    for (int i = 0; i < num_tags; ++i) {
        const auto tag_size = hexi::prefixed_varint_decode<int>(adaptor);
        packet.tags[i].resize_and_overwrite(tag_size, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
            return size;
        });
        adaptor.get(packet.tags[i].data(), tag_size);
    }

    // Deserialize data
    const auto data_size = hexi::prefixed_varint_decode<int>(adaptor);
    packet.data.resize_and_overwrite(data_size, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        return size;
    });
    adaptor.get(packet.data.data(), data_size);

    return packet;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer(hexi::allocators::default_allocator<>());

    // Write header (2 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.header, sizeof(packet.header));

    // Write data length prefix (4 bytes)
    const uint32_t data_len = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data.size());
    buffer.write(&data_len, sizeof(data_len));

    // Write data content
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), data_len);

    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    const auto padding = hexi::detail::fill<16>(0x00);
    buffer.write(padding.data(), padding.size());

    // Write footer (4 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.footer, sizeof(packet.footer));

    // Convert dynamic buffer to std::vector
    return std::vector<uint8_t>(buffer.data(), buffer.data() + buffer.size());
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> pool;
    
    PoolObject* obj1 = allocator.allocate();
    obj1->id = 1;
    obj1->value = 1.1;
    pool.push_back(obj1);
    
    PoolObject* obj2 = allocator.allocate();
    obj2->id = 2;
    obj2->value = 2.2;
    pool.push_back(obj2);
    
    PoolObject* obj3 = allocator.allocate();
    obj3->id = 3;
    obj3->value = 3.3;
    pool.push_back(obj3);
    
    return pool;
}
```</answer>

output.reasoning:
<think>Okay, I need to implement these two functions using the Hexi library's template read and write methods. Let me start by recalling how the Hexi library works. The user mentioned using the buffer_adaptors, so I should probably create buffer sequences and then use the write and read functions with those.

First, the write_typed_data function. The input is a TypedData struct which has an id (uint32_t), value (int16_t), and ratio (double). The task is to write these three fields sequentially into a vector of uint8_t. The function should return this vector.

So, the steps for writing would be: create a buffer write adaptor around the vector, then write each member of the struct in order. But wait, the function is supposed to take the TypedData as a const reference. So inside the function, I need to serialize each of the struct's members into the buffer.

Wait, but how does the write(auto& source) work? The source is the element to be written. So for each field, I can pass the field as the source. For example, first write data.id, then data.value, then data.ratio. But since the write function is a template, maybe I need to use the correct overload for each type.

Wait, the function signature is void write(auto& source); So for each field, when we call write, we pass the variable (like data.id) as the source. The buffer will write the bytes of that variable in its binary form.

So the plan is:

1. Create a std::vector<uint8_t> to hold the result.
2. Create a hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor around this vector.
3. Write each member of the TypedData struct in order using the write function.

But wait, the function is supposed to return the vector. So the code would look like:

auto buffer = std::vector<uint8_t>();
hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
adaptor.write(data.id);
adaptor.write(data.value);
adaptor.write(data.ratio);
return buffer;

But wait, the function is called write_typed_data and takes a const TypedData& data. So yes, that's correct.

Now for the read_typed_data function. It takes a vector of uint8_t and returns a TypedData struct. The process is similar but in reverse. We need to read each field from the buffer in the same order they were written.

So steps:

1. Create a buffer_read_adaptor around the input buffer.
2. Declare a TypedData struct.
3. Read each member in order into the struct's fields.

But how to read into the struct's members? The read function is read(T* destination). So for each field, we pass the address of the field. For example:

TypedData data;
adaptor.read(&data.id);
adaptor.read(&data.value);
adaptor.read(&data.ratio);

Yes. Then return data.

Putting it all together.

Wait, but the read function expects a T*, so for each member, we take the address. So in code:

hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
TypedData data;
adaptor.read(&data.id);
adaptor.read(&data.value);
adaptor.read(&data.ratio);
return data;

That should work.

Now, checking the includes. The user provided the includes for the buffer_adaptors and vector, and cstdint. So the code should be correct.

Testing edge cases: what if the buffer is empty or not enough data? But the problem statement doesn't mention error handling, so perhaps we can assume that the buffer has the correct amount of data.

So the final code should look like:

For write_typed_data:

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct TypedData {
    uint32_t id;
    int16_t value;
    double ratio;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_typed_data(const TypedData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.write(data.id);
    adaptor.write(data.value);
    adaptor.write(data.ratio);
    return buffer;
}

And for read_typed_data:

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

TypedData read_typed_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    TypedData data;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.read(&data.id);
    adaptor.read(&data.value);
    adaptor.read(&data.ratio);

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <cstddef>

std::size_t write_multiple_chunks(const std::vector<std::vector<uint8_t>>& chunks) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_sequence buffer;
    std::size_t total = 0;

    for (const auto& chunk : chunks) {
        while (buffer.free() < chunk.size()) {
            buffer.reserve(chunk.size() - buffer.free());
        }
        buffer.write(chunk.data(), chunk.size());
        total += chunk.size();
    }

    return total;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> read_partial_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, std::size_t chunk_size) {
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> result;
    std::vector<uint8_t> temp(chunk_size);

    while (adaptor.size() > 0) {
        const auto read_size = std::min(adaptor.size(), chunk_size);
        adaptor.read(temp.data(), read_size);
        result.insert(result.end(), temp.begin() + (chunk_size - read_size), temp.end());
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>

#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>
#include <span>

struct ProtocolPacket {
    uint32_t message_id;
    std::vector<uint16_t> data_values;
    uint32_t checksum;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
    hexi::buffer_sequence buffer;
    hexi::stream stream(&buffer, hexi::stream_write);

    // Serialize message_id with endianness conversion
    const auto big_message_id = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
    stream.put(&big_message_id, sizeof(big_message_id));

    // Serialize data_values count with endianness conversion
    const auto count = static_cast<uint32_t>(packet.data_values.size());
    const auto big_count = hexi::endian::native_to_big(count);
    stream.put(&big_count, sizeof(big_count));

    // Serialize data_values with endianness conversion
    if (!packet.data_values.empty()) {
        std::vector<uint16_t> swapped_data(packet.data_values.size());
        for (size_t i = 0; i < packet.data_values.size(); ++i) {
            swapped_data[i] = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.data_values[i]);
        }
        stream.write_container(swapped_data);
    }

    // Serialize checksum with endianness conversion
    const auto big_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
    stream.put(&big_checksum, sizeof(big_checksum));

    return buffer.to_vector();
}

ProtocolPacket deserialize_protocol_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolPacket packet;
    hexi::stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size(), hexi::stream_read);

    // Deserialize message_id with endianness conversion
    uint32_t message_id = 0;
    stream.get(&message_id, sizeof(message_id));
    packet.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(message_id);

    // Deserialize data_values count with endianness conversion
    uint32_t count = 0;
    stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
    count = hexi::endian::big_to_native(count);

    // Deserialize data_values with endianness conversion
    packet.data_values.resize_and_overwrite(count, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        stream.get(data, size);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
            uint16_t& value = reinterpret_cast<uint16_t*>(data + i * sizeof(uint16_t));
            *value = hexi::endian::big_to_native(*value);
        }
        return size;
    });

    // Deserialize checksum with endianness conversion
    uint32_t checksum = 0;
    stream.get(&checksum, sizeof(checksum));
    packet.checksum = hexi::endian::big_to_native(checksum);

    return packet;
}

struct ProtocolHeader {
    uint32_t message_id;
};

ProtocolHeader extract_protocol_header(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    ProtocolHeader header;
    const auto message_id_span = buffer.first(4);
    header.message_id = hexi::endian::big_to_native(*reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(message_id_span.data()));
    buffer.skip(4); // Skip the header portion
    return header;
}

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(hexi::stream& stream) const {
        stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        const uint32_t count = hexi::endian::native_to_little(temperatures.size());
        stream.put(&count, sizeof(count));
        for (const auto& temp : temperatures) {

            stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));

        stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
    }

        stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        uint32_t count = 0;
        stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
        count = hexi::endian::little_to_native(count);
        temperatures.resize(count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {

        stream.get(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(swapped_pressure);
        pressure = swapped_pressure;
    }
};
